prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to England and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The guidance specifically addresses joint targeted area inspections (JTAIs) of the multi-agency response to domestic abuse victims in local authority areas, clearly stating it is applicable to England. Additionally, it references the Domestic Abuse Act 2021, which is legislation specific to England.
